title: santalum paniculatum
intro: Santalum paniculatum, also known as the Queensland sandalwood or red sandalwood, is a species of flowering plant in the sandalwood family, native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Santalum paniculatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, reducing oxidative stress in the body. Santalum paniculatum is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, capsules, and teas, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety, and improve overall well-being.
